detaileddescription.para: Leverages ProcessInterface base class for common initialization tasks. Only handles process-specific configuration and scheme setup.

This method implements the main ProcessInterface run method. For ColumnProcessInterface processes, the actual column iteration is handled by ProcessManager, so this method serves as a placeholder for any 3D operations that might be needed before or after column processing.

briefdescription.para: Parse process configuration using unified approach This function bridges the ConfigManager YAML structure to process-specific configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This method sets up the column processing infrastructure for the process. The base class ColumnProcessInterface handles the actual column virtualization.

briefdescription.para: Process a single virtual column for settling.

detaileddescription.para: This is the core column processing method where the actual atmospheric process calculations happen for a single column. The base class handles column virtualization and calls this method for each virtual column.
Clean up any column processing resources.

briefdescription.para: Get required meteorological fields for this process.
Get required diagnostic fields for this process.
Set the active scheme (for testing purposes)

detaileddescription.para: This method allows tests to override the scheme configuration to test different schemes programmatically.
This method allows retrieval of the current scheme for testing and verification purposes.

briefdescription.para: Register diagnostic fields with the DiagnosticManager and allocate diagnostic storage.
Run the active scheme for a single virtual column.

detaileddescription.para: This method adapts the existing scheme methods to work with virtual columns instead of state manager column indices.

briefdescription.para: Run the gocart scheme for a single virtual column.
Register diagnostic fields with the DiagnosticManager and allocate diagnostic storage.
Calculate and update all diagnostic fields for this process.

detaileddescription.para: With the new flexible column-level design, diagnostics are calculated directly by the science schemes for each column and passed to this method for aggregation or output. This approach uses dimension inference to reduce 2D->scalar and 3D->1D for column processing.

briefdescription.para: Main settling process interface type - extends core ColumnProcessInterface !! This type leverages CATChem's core ColumnProcessInterface infrastructure for column virtualization, focusing only on process-specific configuration and scheme management.

detaileddescription.para: All boilerplate infrastructure and column processing is handled by the base class.
